0.text: Mild bronchial dilatation in the segmental bronchi of the superior segments of both lower lobes

1.text: Significant centrilobular ground-glass nodules in the upper lobes of both lungs

2.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific nodule in both lungs, largest measuring 5.5 mm in diameter at the base of the pleura in the superior segment of the left lower lobe
